description_long: This is a rectangular, low-profile cabinet with a natural light wood finish on all visible surfaces. The front features two large, flat doors with a subtle vertical seam between them, suggesting a push-to-open or handleless design. The top surface is broad and flat, suitable for placing decorative items or electronics. The sides are plain, continuing the wood grain pattern seamlessly from the front and top. The rear view reveals a contrasting white panel with metallic corner brackets and a central open compartment, likely for cable management or ventilation. The overall construction appears sturdy and modern, making it suitable for use as a TV stand, storage unit, or bench in urban environments.
description: A modern, rectangular wood-finished cabinet with two large front doors and a flat top, featuring a contrasting white back panel with metal brackets and an open compartment.
description_view_0: Side view showing the plain wood grain surface with no visible openings or features.
description_view_1: Front view displaying two large, flat wood doors with a vertical seam, forming the main access to the cabinet's interior.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, identical to view 0, showing the plain wood grain surface.
description_view_3: Rear view revealing a white panel with metal corner brackets and a central open compartment, contrasting with the wood finish.
